subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-03-10
subcodes.first_line: The mention of the Cause makes the faith of men firm and strong. Those souls who accept this revelation and then do not engage in teaching and conveying it to others will remain stationary
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @music and singing, @power of prayer
